title: THE 2PM CLUB™ MK - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Milton Keynes, afternoons just got interesting. The 2PM Club lands at MK11 with four hours of the biggest 80s, 90s and 00s throwbacks. Expect Spice Girls anthems, Bon Jovi choruses, Robbie hands-in-the-air, and confetti moments that feel just as epic in daylight. It's nostalgia with proper production, the atmosphere of a sold-out club night, and the joy of finally getting everyone together without the midnight faff. You'll laugh, sing, and dance yourself silly — and still be back home in time for tea.
